11.reason: Full condition should check i==100 to prevent pushing beyond capacity. Currently allows push when i=99, leading to out-of-bounds when i reaches 100.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Full condition should check i==100 to prevent pushing beyond capacity. Currently allows push when i=99, leading to out-of-bounds when i reaches 100.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: condition for full stack should be i==100 (since array size is 100 and i is the next free index). With i==99, push is incorrectly rejected when 99 elements are present.
